generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While our leaders debate defense budgets, local communities are stepping up to build resilience. Neighborhood watch programs and emergency preparedness training are proving more effective than expensive top-down systems. Why not invest in empowering citizens instead of bloated bureaucracies? #CommunityFirst #CivilDefense
